title: Alaskan Lookout Tower
description: Mod adds cozy lookout towers in forests
body: ![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fea069d8ae28ec12757df4d91193406cfe4e38dd.png) _Mod created for [Alaskan Wilderness Reimagined](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/alaskan-wilderness-reimagined) modpack_ # THE TOWER _Mod adds cozy lookout towers in forests_ _Its not forced to spawn on player's spawn location / nearby_ _Use /locate structure annoytower:tower to find it easily after making a world :)_ ![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2c785387d47ced53856b9e1eb486b70f3b0d785_0.webp) ![image2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62a997b42b2c8ab5d61e817dde54d20f547a6c85_0.webp) ![image3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51a8dba5dab24bb53da21f5201ccbb242ddbd3e0_0.webp) # Dependencies Tower contains blocks from other mods Download them too if you want the full experience, or at least "some of them" I've listed the mods from most to least important Crayfish Furniture Farmer's Delight Advanced Chimneys Alex Mobs Brewin n Chewin Farmer's Respite ![image4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a766d5f08a39b11d9279b7b0f437de4714456328_0.webp)
